parameters.filterByFormula: ={{ "AND(IS_AFTER({Date}, '" + $node['Compute Last 7 Days Range'].json.prior_start_utc.slice(0,10) + "'), IS_BEFORE({Date}, '" + $node['Compute Last 7 Days Range'].json.prior_end_utc.slice(0,10) + "'))" }}
={{ "AND(IS_AFTER({Timestamp}, '" + $node['Compute Last 7 Days Range'].json.start_utc + "'), IS_BEFORE({Timestamp}, '" + $node['Compute Last 7 Days Range'].json.end_utc + "'))" }}

={{ "AND(IS_AFTER({Published date}, '" + $node['Compute Last 7 Days Range'].json.start_utc.slice(0,10) + "'), IS_BEFORE({Published date}, '" + $node['Compute Last 7 Days Range'].json.end_utc.slice(0,10) + "'))" }}

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.subject }}
parameters.html:
={{ '
' + $json.markdown.replace(/&/g, '&').replace(//g, '>') + '
' }}

parameters.text:
={{ '📰 Weekly Ops Briefing sent — ' + $json.week_start + ' → ' + $json.week_end + '
Revenue: $' + $json.blob.revenue_week + ' (WoW ' + ($json.blob.wow_revenue_pct >= 0 ? '+' : '') + $json.blob.wow_revenue_pct + '%)
Orders: ' + $json.blob.orders_week + ' | Anomalies flagged: ' + $json.blob.anomalies.length + '
Full briefing emailed to Daniel and saved to WeeklyBriefings.' }}
